about.bio: 4th year at UVA pursuing a B.S in Computer Science and Minor in Data Science expected by Spring 2026. Passionate about solving problems and learning anything cool.

projects.name: SK-GPT
description: Implemented ChatGPT from scratch using neural networks with custom backpropagation and gradient descent algorithms.

projects.name: Micrograd
description: Implementing backpropagation over a dynamically built DAG. Creating a neural network from scratch.
projects.stack: TensorFlow, Python, Neural Networks, Backpropagation, Gradient Descent

projects.name: Siblings or Dating – Facial Recognition
description: Created MobileNetV2 CNN with transfer learning, classifying Reddit images using PRAW.
Achieved 80% validation accuracy with hyperparameter tuning.

projects.name: Akuna Capital Quant Trading Challenge
description: Built Python-based market making framework using nonlinear optimization and stochastic modeling.
Integrated reinforcement learning for adaptive strategy.

projects.name: Poker Bot
description: Applied Monte Carlo counterfactual regret minimization to solve 2-player Kuhn Poker.

projects.name: TenantTalk
description: Web app for rating landlords; followed Scrum with weekly meetings and sprint planning.

projects.name: Coccidiosis Classification
description: CNN to classify chicken images and detect Coccidiosis using 1000+ labeled images.

projects.name: Film Finder
description: Used Python with NumPy, scikit-learn, Pickle, and TMDB API to recommend films.

projects.name: EzCite
description: Built React + Next.js site; used Perplexity LLM and Node.js (discord.js, Puppeteer).
projects.stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

projects.name: Natural Language Processing Application
description: NER app to extract names, cities, states, countries using Stanford CoreNLP.

projects.name: European Option Pricing
description: Monte Carlo model for pricing vanilla options in C++ using GBM and Box-Muller algorithm.

projects.name: EDO.ai
description: Researching models to predict diabetes based on blood test data.

details: Pioneered an end-to-end MVP, involving REST APIs, for a Project Development Life Cycle management system based on Shift Left method, scoped to unlock $15M–$20M annually in engineering productivity across 3000+ engineers.

Partnered with 15+ Senior Directors, VPs, and SMEs in a cross-functional tiger team to design a bi-directional data synchronizing single source of truth system with document parsing, Slack, Azure Devops and Word APIs.
Automated email notifications by performing a data analysis on DORA metrics by processing 17,000+ repos and fetching 2,000+ system owners using GraphQL and pandas.
Contributed to a data processing solution with Spring Boot and Batch, for 3M handling over 2M search data points.
Optimized scalable big data pipelines via Kafka + Airflow, leading to a 3% improvement in semantic search time.
Enhanced a RAG-based system, generating high-dimensional embeddings with AWS Bedrock (Titan Text Embeddings),
integrating kNN vector search in OpenSearch, using Claude API prompt engineering for context relevant responses.
Led a group of interns to develop a secure REST API using MERN, JWT and Bcrypt. Worked on a CI/CD environment
for an employee management app incorporating Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins + Bitbucket.
Embedded with cross-functional stakeholders in a forward-deployed capacity, translating client requirements into
production-ready MERN features and improving delivery speed and alignment with business needs.
